summary: Stocks fell and bond yields climbed after a weekend of attacks and counterstrikes in the Middle East sent oil prices higher.

title: Morgan Stanley’s Wilson Sees Profit Boost for Stocks Beyond Tech
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的威尔逊认为科技股以外的股票利润将得到提振
summary: US stocks beyond the technology giants are poised to report strong earnings this season, broadening the equity rally, according to Morgan Stanley strategists.

title: Akzo Nobel Rejects $8.6 Billion Nippon Offer for Paint Business
title_cn: 阿克苏诺贝尔拒绝 Nippon 86 亿美元收购涂料业务的报价
summary: Akzo Nobel NV’s board rejected an offer from Nippon Paint Holdings Co. for its decorative paints business, and continued to recommend an agreed merger with Axalta Coating Systems Ltd.

title: MUFG Surpasses Toyota to Become Most Valuable Company in Japan
title_cn: 三菱日联超越丰田成为日本最有价值公司
summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group Inc.’s stock market value shot up to the highest in Japan, marking the first time a bank reached the top position since the current so-called three megabank groups were established.

title: Sfakianakis: Iran Tests US Resolve in Hormuz
title_cn: 斯法基亚纳基斯：伊朗在霍尔木兹考验美国的决心
summary:
Iran and the United States traded tit-for-tat attacks over the weekend, with both sides issuing conflicting declarations on whether the Strait of Hormuz is open for shipping. John Sfakianakis, Chief Economist and Head of Research at the Gulf Research Center, told Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa that return to a full scale-war is a possibility but we are "not yet" there.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: El Niño and Iran War Team Up in a Food Squeeze
title_cn: 厄尔尼诺现象和伊朗战争联手造成粮食短缺
summary: US consumers are already on edge after prices never fell from post-Covid inflation.

title: South Africa Plans First Strategic Oil Boost Since Apartheid
title_cn: 南非计划自种族隔离以来首次战略石油增产
summary: South Africa plans to increase its strategic oil reserves for the first time since the apartheid government stockpiled crude, adding to measures across the continent to mitigate supply shocks.

title: Yen Falls on Report Japan Has No Plans to Change GPIF Allocation
title_cn: 日元下跌，因有报道称日本没有计划改变 GPIF 分配
summary: The yen weakened against the dollar after Reuters reported that Japan has no plans to overhaul the Government Pension Investment Fund’s asset allocation.

title: SK Hynix Shares Plunge Most on Record in Deepening Korea Selloff
title_cn: 韩国抛售加剧，SK海力士股价创历史新高
summary: SK Hynix Inc. shares tumbled by the most on record in Seoul on Monday after the memory chipmaker’s highly anticipated US trading debut.

title: Investors Weigh War Risks as US and Iran Trade Fire | Insight with Haslinda Amin 7/13/2026
title_cn: 美国和伊朗交火，投资者权衡战争风险哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 7/13/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Euro-Area Outlook Cut by Economists as Iran War Weighs on Region
title_cn: 由于伊朗战争给该地区带来压力，经济学家下调了欧元区前景
summary: Growth in the euro zone is set to be weaker this year than previously predicted after hostilities in the Middle East resumed, economists say.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 7/13/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 7/13/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bahoshy: Mideast Venture Funding Plunges in 1H
title_cn: Bahoshy：上半年中东风险投资大幅下滑
summary: Private capital data platform, Magnitt, says Middle East venture funding fell 22% in the first half of the year, with actual deal count plunging by 41%. Many of the deals were signed before the US-Israel attacks on Iran. CEO Philip Bahoshy told Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa that the real test will hit this summer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Healthcare Looks Ready to Star in Rotation Trade
title_cn: 医疗保健似乎已准备好在轮换贸易中脱颖而出
summary: A compelling argument is growing for healthcare stocks to be among the big winners in the rotation to more defensive parts of the market as the sector’s outlook improves.

title: Bridgepoint Buys Large Stake in Danish Drone Firm UMag Solutions
title_cn: Bridgepoint 收购丹麦无人机公司 UMag Solutions 的大量股份
summary: UK-listed private capital firm Bridgepoint Group is acquiring a majority stake in UMag Solutions ApS, a Danish defense technology company, adding to a raft of deals involving dronemakers.

title: Tata Capital Enters Red-Hot Gold Loan Market Through Acquisition
title_cn: 塔塔资本通过收购进入炙手可热的黄金贷款市场
summary: Tata Capital Ltd., one of India’s biggest shadow lenders, is entering the country’s $194 billion gold loan market by acquiring a majority stake in Yogakshemam Loans Ltd., intensifying competition in the nation’s fastest-growing lending segment.

title: China Rejects South China Sea Ruling on 10th Anniversary | The China Show 7/13/2026
title_cn: 十周年之际中国拒绝南海裁决|中国展 7/13/2026
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Stocks Rise, Tech Stocks Fall After Latest Iran Strikes
title_cn: 伊朗最新袭击后石油股上涨，科技股下跌

title: TSMC Sales Surge 36% in Fresh Sign of AI Spending Momentum
title_cn: 台积电销售额飙升 36%，人工智能支出势头新迹象
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported quarterly sales rose 36%, meeting high expectations and signaling global demand for AI hardware remains intact.

title: US and Iran Trade Fresh Strikes, Dispute Whether Hormuz Is Open
title_cn: 美国和伊朗进行新的打击，对霍尔木兹是否开放存在争议
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes overnight into Monday as they continued their tit-for-tat attacks while issuing conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz was open to shipping.

title: Global Funds Return to Indian Stocks With $1 Billion in Buying
title_cn: 全球基金重回印度股市 买入 10 亿美元
summary: Foreign investors poured more than $1 billion into Indian equities last week, with Goldman Sachs Group Inc. predicting further inflows as a stable currency and improved earnings expectations prompt funds to add to their holdings.

title: Fall of Top Graft Hunter Raises Hard Questions for Indonesia
title_cn: 顶级贪污猎人的倒台给印度尼西亚带来了严峻的问题
summary: Rows of gold bars, stacks of US and Singapore dollars and seven suitcases found inside a locked safe have become the defining images of one of the biggest scandals to hit Indonesia’s law-enforcement establishment in years.

title: MiniMax Shares Slump After JPMorgan Cuts Target Price Further
title_cn: 摩根大通进一步下调目标价后 MiniMax 股价暴跌
summary: MiniMax Group Inc.’s shares plunged, after JPMorgan Chase & Co. slashed the Chinese AI model maker’s price target for the second time in less than a week on value dilution concerns caused by fresh fundraising.

title: Oil Jumps as Conflict Over Hormuz Escalates With Fresh Strikes
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突升级，新一轮袭击导致油价上涨
summary: Oil jumped as the US completed another wave of strikes against Iran, with the two sides disputing whether the Strait of Hormuz was open.

title: China’s Oil Imports May Be Set to Recover as Stockpiling Returns
title_cn: 随着库存的恢复，中国的石油进口可能会恢复
summary: China’s crude imports look poised to recover from a months-long slump as the country relaxes fuel export curbs, raises run rates and snaps up prompt Middle East supplies, with analysts and traders forecasting a return to strategic stockpiling later this year.

title: Markets Weigh Fresh US Strikes on Iran | The Asia Trade 7/13/2026
title_cn: 市场权衡美国对伊朗的新打击|亚洲贸易 7/13/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Singapore with Shery Ahn and Avril Hong, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI, Iran War Risks Weigh on Indian IT Firms’ Earnings Outlook
title_cn: 人工智能、伊朗战争风险打压印度 IT 公司的盈利前景
summary: HCL Technologies Ltd., Wipro Ltd. and Tech Mahindra Ltd. are set to report earnings as their investor base increasingly questions the value of traditional IT services in the age of artificial intelligence.

title: Base Metals Decline as US, Iran Flare-Up Clouds Demand Outlook
title_cn: 美国、伊朗局势恶化给需求前景蒙上阴影，基本金属下跌
summary: Base metals retreated after renewed hostilities between the US and Iran fueled concerns over global economic growth, clouding the outlook for industrial commodities.

title: Gold and Silver Drop as Mideast Strikes Heighten Rate-Hike Risks
title_cn: 中东袭击加剧加息风险，黄金和白银下跌
summary: Gold and silver tumbled after the US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes over the weekend, sending energy prices higher and once more raising the prospects for interest-rate hikes to combat inflation.

title: US Renews Iran Strikes as Both Sides Dispute Hormuz Status
title_cn: 由于双方对霍尔木兹海峡地位存在争议，美国再次对伊朗发动袭击
summary: The US launched fresh missile attacks against Iran on Sunday in what has become a pattern of strikes and counterstrikes by Washington and Tehran as the two sides issued conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz is open to shipping.

title: Africa’s Raxio to Enter Tanzania With $380 Million Funding Push
title_cn: 非洲 Raxio 融资 3.8 亿美元进入坦桑尼亚
summary: Africa-focused data-center firm Raxio Group plans to enter Tanzania as it increases its funding pool to $380 million, Chief Executive Officer Robert Mullins said.

title: South Korea to Tap Record AI Tax Windfall to Fund Future Growth
title_cn: 韩国将利用创纪录的人工智能税收暴利为未来增长提供资金
summary: South Korea expects to reap a record tax windfall from the artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom, giving President Lee Jae Myung’s government fresh fiscal firepower to fund an ambitious investment agenda.

title: SK Hynix Shares Slump in South Korea After US Listing
title_cn: SK海力士在美国上市后韩国股价暴跌
summary: SK Hynix shares declined in Seoul on Monday after the memory chipmaker’s highly-anticipated US trading debut. The company’s $26.5 billion US offering was closely watched as a test of demand for overseas offerings as well as for the longevity of the artificial intelligence rally. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Once-Struggling SK Hynix Became a Trillion-Dollar Company
title_cn: 曾经陷入困境的 SK 海力士如何成为价值万亿美元的公司
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is hardly a household name. But the maker of memory chips, which two decades ago was struggling to survive, is now South Korea’s second-most valuable listed company, just behind Samsung Electronics Co.

title: アップルのMacチップ戦略転換、自動運転車の「失敗」がAI基盤築く－Power On
title_cn: 苹果Mac芯片战略转变，自动驾驶汽车“失败”为AI奠定基础 - Power On
summary: 中止した自動運転車開発の技術遺産。現在のAI競争力を支える意外な理由とは。

title: Hyundai Motor Workers Strike Over Bonuses, Robot Job Security
title_cn: 现代汽车工人因奖金和机器人工作保障而罢工
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. workers began a three-day partial strike on Monday as their union demands bigger bonuses following landmark deals at semiconductor companies, and seek guarantees jobs won’t be lost to AI and robots.

title: Netflix Combats Questions About Slowing Growth
title_cn: Netflix 回应有关增长放缓的问题
summary: Netflix’s growth is slowing. What comes next?

title: Apple’s M6, M7 and M8 Chips Show How AI Is Reshaping the Company
title_cn: 苹果的 M6、M7 和 M8 芯片展示了人工智能如何重塑公司
summary: Also: New Apple Pencils are coming.

title: OpenAI, Meta, SpaceXAI Compete for More Cost-Efficient AI Models
title_cn: OpenAI、Meta、SpaceXAI 争夺更具成本效益的人工智能模型
summary: Three prominent artificial intelligence developers released new models over the past week. They all promise to be more advanced, but their biggest immediate selling point may not be what they can do but how little they charge to do it.

title: Zhipu’s Chinese Founder Says Frontier AI Should Stay Open to All
title_cn: 智普创始人表示前沿人工智能应该向所有人开放
summary: The founder of Chinese AI lab Zhipu argued that frontier artificial intelligence should remain broadly accessible rather than controlled by select individuals, weighing in on a growing debate about the risks posed by ever more powerful models.

title: China EVs on Road Have Average Age of 1.8 Years, Newspaper Says
title_cn: 报纸称中国上路电动汽车平均车龄为 1.8 年
summary: Chinese electric vehicles on the road are on average just 1.8 years old, compared with 8.2 years for gasoline-powered cars, 21st Century Business Herald reported, citing a report by the China Association of Automobile Manufacturers and Hejun Consulting.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over AI Talent Fight
title_cn: 苹果因人工智能人才争夺战起诉 OpenAI
summary: Bloomberg Tech host Ed Ludlow says Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI reflects an intensifying battle for AI talent and hardware leadership, with Apple alleging former employees improperly took trade secrets as OpenAI expands its device ambitions. He also says SK Hynix expects AI memory demand to outpace supply, plans to increase US investment beyond $35 billion, and sees the next test for the AI boom coming as technology companies report earnings and investors assess whether spending is translating into profits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Engineer’s ‘LOL’ Moment Set Stage for Legal Fight With Apple
title_cn: OpenAI 工程师的“哈哈”时刻为与苹果的法律斗争奠定了基础
summary: When iPhone engineer Chang Liu quit for a job at OpenAI’s nascent hardware division, Apple Inc. says he left with more than just years of experience.

title: Why Fox is ‘the most Disciplined’ Media Entertainment Company in the Streaming Era
title_cn: 为什么福克斯是流媒体时代“最自律”的媒体娱乐公司
summary: Media veteran Michael Wolf discusses Allen & Company’s annual Sun Valley Conference and breaks down the mega deals that are reshaping the entertainment industry. He explains why free ad-supported content is the unsung winner of the streaming wars, and digs into the ways AI is changing the value of content.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fresh US-Iran Strikes Threaten Ceasefire; TMSC Sales Surge | Daybreak Europe 7/13/2026
title_cn: 美伊新一轮袭击威胁停火； TMSC 销售激增 |黎明欧洲 7/13/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, oil jumped after the US and Iran traded fresh strikes. US Central Command says dozens of targets were hit in one of the heaviest bombardments since an interim deal to end the war was signed in June. Tehran retaliated with attacks on US allies in the Persian Gulf and beyond.

SK Hynix shares fell more than 13% in Seoul, after its highly-anticipated US trading debut. The slump drove the benchmark Kospi 8% lower, triggering a brief circuit-breaker suspension. In Taiwan, TSMC reported a 36% jump in quarterly sales, in a sign that global demand for AI hardware remains intact.

Today's guest: Lale Akoner, eToro, Global Market Analyst. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Moscow Faces Second Day of Mass Ukrainian Drone Attacks
title_cn: 莫斯科面临乌克兰无人机大规模袭击的第二天
summary: Moscow faced a second day of large-scale Ukrainian drone attacks, with officials reporting hundreds of the unmanned craft flying toward the Russian capital and three fatalities in the surrounding region.

title: US and Iran Trade Fresh Strikes
title_cn: 美国和伊朗进行新的打击
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes overnight into Monday as they continued their tit-for-tat attacks while issuing conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz was open to shipping. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Malaysia’s Anwar Weakened by Ally’s Landslide in Johor Elections
title_cn: 马来西亚安华因盟友在柔佛选举中获得压倒性胜利而削弱
summary: Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s grip over Malaysia‘s ruling alliance took a hit over the weekend after coalition partner Barisan Nasional swept elections in Johor, strengthening the former ruling bloc’s hand as the government weighs whether to call an early general election.

title: Why Private Markets Hold the Next Generation of AI Winners
title_cn: 为什么私募市场拥有下一代人工智能赢家
summary: Anthropic, Stripe and OpenAI are some of the world's most sought-after private companies. Maggie Fanari explains to host Merryn Somerset Webb how her team invests in them and similar firms before they reach public markets. Fanari is chief executive of J. Rothschild Capital Management, which manages the £4.5 billion ($6 billion) RIT Capital Partners trust. She shares why she believes the next wave of artificial intelligence could create a $60 trillion opportunity, why private markets are becoming increasingly important, and where she sees the biggest investment opportunities over the next decade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ships Transit the Strait of Hormuz in Secret
title_cn: 船只秘密通过霍尔木兹海峡
summary: A steady stream of ships has passed through the Strait of Hormuz in secret in recent days, while observable traffic has dwindled. Shipowners’ preference to go dark when pushing through Hormuz comes as the US and Iran exchange tit-for-tat attacks and also offer competing narratives of who is in charge of the strait. Bloomberg's Anthony di Paola reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Malaysia Top Court Clears Former Youth Minister of Graft Charges
title_cn: 马来西亚最高法院撤销前青年部长的贪污指控
summary: Malaysia’s top court upheld former youth and sports minister Syed Saddiq Abdul Rahman’s acquittal, bringing an end to his graft case involving his former party’s funds.

title: Long Night of Jakarta Raids Found Gold Bars, Wads of Cash
title_cn: 雅加达长夜突袭发现金条和大量现金
summary: Diners at de’Clan Signature, an eatery in the low-rise South Jakarta neighborhood of Cipete, knew something was up when heavily armed police converged upon the restaurant last Wednesday afternoon.

title: Hungary Is Poised to Oust President in a Rollback of Orban Era
title_cn: 匈牙利准备在欧尔班时代倒退时罢黜总统
summary: Hungarian lawmakers are set to oust the Viktor Orban-allied president as Prime Minister Peter Magyar seeks a clean break from his nationalist predecessor.

title: CA Budget ‘Kneecapped’ Hollywood Tax Credit, Lawmakers
title_cn: 加州预算“跪着”好莱坞税收抵免，立法者
summary: A California business tax credit cap aimed at saving $4 billion threatens to drive away film and television production, according to a letter signed by a bipartisan group of lawmakers who demanded a quick fix to the budget signed by Governor Gavin Newsom.

title: Why Australia’s Superannuation System Has Caught Trump’s Attention
title_cn: 为什么澳大利亚的养老金制度引起了特朗普的关注
summary: At A$4.4 trillion ($3.1 trillion), Australia’s pension system is the fourth-largest pool of retirement savings in the world — and the fastest-growing among major markets. It’s expected to overtake the UK and Canada by the early 2030s to become the second-largest globally.

title: DOJ Investigating Allegations Against UAW President Fain
title_cn: 美国司法部正在调查针对 UAW 主席费恩的指控
summary: The US Justice Department launched a grand jury investigation into allegations that the head of the United Auto Workers pressured another high-ranking union official to secure benefits for his fiancée and her sister, according to internal communications within the labor organization.

title: Graham Death Sets Up Succession Drama in South Carolina
title_cn: 格雷厄姆之死在南卡罗来纳州引发了继任戏剧
summary: The sudden death of US Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina sets up a succession drama in the deeply conservative state that risks throwing the race into chaos less than four months before the midterm elections.

title: McConnell Explains Absence by Saying He Suffered Fall Weeks Ago
title_cn: 麦康奈尔解释缺席原因，称他几周前摔倒了
summary: Senator Mitch McConnell said he suffered a fall in June and contracted pneumonia that required hospitalization, breaking a lengthy silence that triggered weeks of speculation about his health.

title: Lindsey Graham’s Death Deprives Ukraine of Key Trump Whisperer
title_cn: 林赛·格雷厄姆的去世使乌克兰失去了特朗普的关键人物
summary: The death of Senator Lindsey Graham leaves key US allies like Ukraine, which have at times struggled to influence the Trump administration, without one of their most effective conduits to the White House.

title: US Says It Launched New Round of Strikes Against Iran on Sunday
title_cn: 美国称周日对伊朗发动新一轮打击
summary: The US military launched additional strikes against Iran Sunday aimed at further weakening the Islamic Republic’s ability to strike civilian vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, the US Central Command said.

title: Lindsey Graham, Senate Hawk Turned Trump Ally, Dies at 71
title_cn: 林赛·格雷厄姆，参议院鹰派变成特朗普盟友，去世，享年 71 岁
summary: Lindsey Graham, the South Carolina senior senator and foreign policy hawk who changed from a Donald Trump skeptic to one of the US president’s strongest allies, died on Saturday. He was 71.

title: Burnham Weighs Bigger Budget as Experts Lobby on Economic Policy
title_cn: 专家游说经济政策，伯纳姆考虑增加预算
summary: Andy Burnham, the UK’s presumptive next prime minister, is considering unveiling a bolstered budget later this year as allies and experts seek to persuade him to pursue a land tax, public control of utilities and a more ambitious devolution strategy.

title: Zelenskyy Cabinet Shakeup Puts Kyiv’s Winter Resilience in Focus
title_cn: 泽伦斯基内阁改组将基辅的冬季恢复能力置于焦点
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s surprise move to overhaul his government and potentially install an energy executive as prime minister is the latest sign of the Ukrainian president’s determination to spare his war-weary nation a repeat of last winter’s hardships.

title: Senator Lindsey Graham Dies at 71
title_cn: 参议员林赛·格雷厄姆去世，享年 71 岁
summary: Lindsey Graham, the South Carolina senior senator and foreign policy hawk who changed from a Donald Trump skeptic to one of the US president’s strongest allies, died on Saturday. He was 71. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zelenskyy Ousts Premier, Weighs Naftogaz Chief for the Role
title_cn: 泽伦斯基罢免总理，任命 Naftogaz 首席执行官
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy removed Ukraine’s prime minister as part of a shift in “political strategy,” and may tap a state energy executive or former premier as her replacement as Kyiv prepares for winter under the threat of continued Russian attacks.

title: Zimbabwe President Says Term Extension Decision Was ‘Collective’
title_cn: 津巴布韦总统表示延长任期的决定是“集体的”
summary: Zimbabwean President Emmerson Mnangagwa said a constitutional amendment to extend his tenure by two more years was a collective decision, the Sunday Mail reported.

title: Graham Leaves Lasting Mark on Senate
title_cn: 格雷厄姆在参议院留下了持久的印记
summary: Bloomberg Congressional reporter Erik Wasson says Sen. Lindsey Graham leaves a significant void in the Republican Party as a leading advocate of an interventionist foreign policy, defense spending and a strong US role abroad. Wasson says Graham evolved into a key ally of President Donald Trump, helping advance the administration's judicial agenda while remaining an influential voice on national security, with attention now turning to who could succeed him in the Senate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Says 53,449 Migrants Returned or Deported in Crackdown
title_cn: 南非称 53,449 名移民在镇压中被遣返或驱逐出境
summary: South Africa said more than 53,000 foreign nationals had been processed for deportation or voluntary repatriation as authorities acted on pledges to speed up removals while warning vigilante groups to stop conducting illegal searches for undocumented foreigners.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend | Trump Threats to “Decimate” Iran, Trade Secret Lawsuit
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 |特朗普威胁“消灭”伊朗，商业秘密诉讼
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Adm. Daryl Caudle, US Dept of War Chief of Naval Operations, Clara Gillispie, Council on Foreign Relations Sr. Fellow for Climate & Energy, and Colin Demarest, Future of Defense Reporter for Axios. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Asean Begins Re-Engaging Myanmar in First Talks Since 2021 Coup
title_cn: 东盟开始与缅甸重新接触，参加 2021 年政变以来的首次会谈
summary: Southeast Asian nations re-engaged with Myanmar’s government after years of limited contact, while reiterating it must comply with the bloc’s five-point peace consensus before ties can be fully normalized.

title: Trump Embraces Australian Retirement System Backed by Larry Fink
title_cn: 特朗普拥抱拉里·芬克支持的澳大利亚退休制度
summary: The world’s most-envied retirement plan has another high-profile booster: President Donald Trump.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend | Trump Threats to “Decimate” Iran, Trade Secret Lawsuit
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 |特朗普威胁“消灭”伊朗，商业秘密诉讼
summary:
The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Adm. Daryl Caudle, US Dept of War Chief of Naval Operations, Clara Gillespie, Council on Foreign Relations Sr. Fellow for Climate & Energy, and Colin Demarest, Future of Defense Reporter for Axios.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
